projects.name: Executive Sales Performance Dashboard
projects.problem: Executive leadership lacked real-time visibility into sales performance across regions, products, and teams, leading to delayed decisions and missed targets.
projects.solution: Built a comprehensive Power BI dashboard with real-time data refresh, drill-through capabilities, and executive-level KPI summaries. Implemented role-level security so each stakeholder sees their relevant data.
impact: Reduced time-to-insight from days to minutes
Enabled data-driven sales strategy adjustments
Adopted by C-suite for weekly business reviews

projects.name: Customer Experience & NPS Management Platform
projects.problem: Customer satisfaction data was siloed across departments with no unified view of NPS trends, complaint patterns, or service recovery opportunities.
projects.solution: Designed a unified analytics platform integrating customer feedback, NPS surveys, and complaint data. Built automated alerting for NPS drops and a case management view for service recovery.
impact: Unified customer satisfaction data into single source of truth
Enabled proactive service recovery
Improved customer communication through data-driven insights

projects.name: AI-Powered CCTV Analytics
projects.problem: Manual monitoring of CCTV feeds was resource-intensive and failed to capture critical events in real-time. Security insights were reactive, not proactive.
projects.solution: Developed a computer vision pipeline using YOLO object detection and OpenCV to automatically analyze CCTV footage, detect anomalies, count footfall, and generate real-time alerts. Built a FastAPI backend to serve analytics data to a monitoring dashboard.
impact: Automated surveillance monitoring, reducing manual effort by 70%
Real-time anomaly detection and alerts
Generated footfall analytics for operational planning

projects.name: Digital Marketing & Call Centre Dashboard
projects.problem: Marketing spend and call centre performance were tracked in separate systems with no correlation analysis — making it impossible to measure campaign-to-conversion efficiency.
projects.solution: Built a unified dashboard connecting marketing campaign data with call centre metrics. Enabled attribution analysis showing which campaigns drove the highest quality inbound calls and conversions.
impact: Enabled marketing ROI measurement for the first time
Identified highest-performing channels
Reduced wasted marketing spend through data-driven allocation

projects.name: Attendance & Productivity Analytics
projects.problem: HR had no systematic way to track attendance patterns, identify productivity trends, or forecast staffing needs — leading to operational disruptions and planning gaps.
projects.solution: Built an automated analytics system processing attendance data from multiple sources, generating productivity scores, identifying patterns, and providing forecasting for workforce planning.
impact: Enabled data-driven HR decisions
Identified attendance patterns linked to operational performance
Supported workforce planning with predictive insights

projects.name: Executive Financial & P&L Analytics Platform
projects.problem: Monthly P&L reporting was a manual, time-consuming process with frequent errors. Finance leadership lacked timely visibility into cost centers, revenue streams, and profitability drivers.
projects.solution: Developed an automated P&L analytics platform with real-time financial dashboards, cost center breakdowns, variance analysis, and budget vs. actuals tracking. Integrated with ERP data sources.
impact: Reduced monthly close reporting time by 35%
Provided executive real-time P&L visibility
Enabled faster financial decision-making

projects.name: Healthcare Operations Intelligence Dashboard
projects.problem: Neuberg Diagnostics needed visibility into lab operations, turnaround times, sample processing efficiency, and quality metrics across multiple diagnostic centers.
projects.solution: Built a comprehensive operational intelligence platform covering lab TAT, sample rejection rates, equipment utilization, and quality KPIs. Enabled benchmarking across centers and identification of improvement opportunities.
impact: Improved lab turnaround time visibility
Identified quality control improvement areas
Enabled center-level benchmarking for operational excellence

projects.name: Business Process Automation Suite
projects.problem: Analysts spent 60-70% of their time on repetitive data collection, formatting, and distribution tasks — leaving little time for actual analysis and insight generation.
projects.solution: Built an end-to-end automation suite covering report generation, data collection, email distribution, and dashboard refresh orchestration. Each automation is monitored with error alerts and audit logs.
impact: Automated 80% of recurring reporting tasks
Saved hundreds of analyst hours monthly
Improved report accuracy by eliminating manual errors
